summary: A repost of a vertical selfie-style clip of a man wearing a red 'MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' cap and a blue polo shirt, speaking directly to the camera against a plain light wall. The framing stays close on his face across the sampled frames.

script.scene: A man in a red 'MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' cap and blue polo speaks to the camera against a plain wall.
The same man continues speaking, same close framing.
